description: Creates a new Scheduled Query that allows you to define a Logs Insights query that will run on a schedule and configure actions to take with the query results.

ScheduledQueryState.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Allowed Values: ENABLED | DISABLED  
Update requires: No interruption

DestinationIdentifier.markdownDescription:
---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Pattern: ^s3://[a-z0-9][\.\-a-z0-9]{1,61}[a-z0-9](/.*)?  
Update requires: No interruption

RoleArn.markdownDescription:
---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption

S3Configuration.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

DestinationConfiguration.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Update requires: No interruption

ScheduledQueryArn.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Update requires: No interruption
Read only property: Yes

Name.markdownDescription:
---

Required: Yes  
Type: String  
Minimum Length: 1  
Maximum Length: 255  
Pattern: ^[a-zA-Z0-9_\-/.#]+$  
Update requires: Replacement

Description.markdownDescription:
---

Required: No  
Type: String  
Maximum Length: 1024  
Update requires: No interruption
